headline: Capital One Software Announces New Observability and AI-Powered Optimization Capabilities for Slingshot to Drive System-Wide Data Efficiency
summary: MCLEAN, Va., June 01, 2026--Capital One Software, the enterprise B2B software business of Capital One, today announced intelligent optimization features for Capital One Slingshot, designed to improve performance and quickly detect and resolve data infrastructure issues. By utilizing context across a user's environment, Slingshot will identify opportunities to improve workload performance in Snowflake that go beyond basic SQL syntax and storage costs.
